description_en: Oracle version should not be lower than 11.2.0.4

query_sql: SELECT a.tablespace_name, ROUND((a.bytes-b.bytes)/a.bytes*100) AS used_pct FROM (SELECT tablespace_name, SUM(bytes) AS bytes FROM dba_data_files GROUP BY tablespace_name) a, (SELECT tablespace_name, SUM(bytes) AS bytes FROM dba_free_space GROUP BY tablespace_name) b WHERE a.tablespace_name = b.tablespace_name
description_zh: 表空间使用率不应超过 85%

query_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dba_objects WHERE status != 'VALID'
description_zh: 无效对象数量不应超过 10 个
生产环境应开启归档模式
description_en: Production environment should enable archive log mode
